goal: Fix orchestrator turn detection: Deepgram is_final batches multiple words; orchestrator was concatenating them into one pending_finals entry, so word_count stayed at 1 and never crossed MIN_WORDS_FOR_SPECULATION=3. Split chars by the word=X tag in CharEntry.notes so each Deepgram-emitted word becomes a real entry; word_count now reflects actual words spoken and Crosstalk fires the LLM after the user pauses.
